category_sources: source_facts.description says fswatch monitors a directory for changes and runs a shell command; official documentation describes current command and libfswatch manuals.
docs_sources: Official fswatch GitHub Pages documentation page lists current command manual, API reference, release docs, and wiki links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides an official repository URL; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official documentation identify fswatch as a file change monitor with command and library documentation.
